goal: Advance the animation through graphics-research-inspired visual algorithms: spatiotemporal blue noise, filter-adapted temporal sampling, perceptual error placement, anisotropic motion sampling, vorticity-preserving mouse flow, layer-aware perception, constrained OKLCH color optimization, and cell-space temporal anti-aliasing.

research_basis.inspiration: Use blue-noise properties across x, y, and time to reduce low-sample flicker and improve temporal stability in animated sparse effects.
Adapt sample distributions to the temporal reconstruction filter instead of treating afterimage as a separate post-process.
Move stochastic error into visually less sensitive regions and frequencies rather than distributing it uniformly.
Match sample spacing to motion direction so fast directional trails read as intentional motion instead of random sparkle.
Preserve small-scale curl in a low-resolution velocity field so mouse-driven particles feel like a coherent flow.

research_basis.topic: Perceptual color spaces and constrained color optimization
research_basis.inspiration: Optimize OKLCH lightness and chroma under contrast, smoothness, gamut, and layer-role constraints.
Use history accumulation with rejection and confidence rather than simple residual trails.

todos.title: Implement spatiotemporal blue-noise particle scheduling
implemented: Added deterministic stbn_value(column,row,layer,frame_index).
Applied STBN gates and shimmer to background particle heads and tails.
Kept deterministic snapshot and frame recording behavior.

todos.title: Replace fixed afterimage decay with filter-adapted temporal sampling
implemented: Added TemporalKernel with FPS-specific history weight, rejection threshold, and decay seconds.
AfterimageBuffer now selects kernels from TerminalCalibration.target_fps.
Text remains excluded from afterimage capture.

todos.title: Drive particle placement with a perceptual error field
implemented: Added PerceptualErrorField derived from logo area, frame box, and mouse focus.
Background particle visibility and intensity are attenuated in high-attention regions.
Logo and orbit hierarchy are protected without increasing particle density.

todos.title: Add anisotropic blue-noise sampling for directional trails
implemented: Added velocity-aligned anisotropic_distance.
Mouse drag emission uses anisotropic spacing to keep fast trails long and narrow.
Existing mouse speed buckets continue to shape tail length and swirl radius.

todos.title: Replace per-particle mouse forces with a vorticity-preserving velocity grid
implemented: Added VelocityGrid with x/y velocity and curl per coarse terminal region.
Left-button mouse drag injects velocity and curl; release does not emit new particles.
Particles sample velocity and vorticity confinement forces during integration.

todos.title: Replace single contrast floor with layer-aware perceptual contrast
implemented: Added PerceptualRole for background particles, afterimages, mouse trails, orbit, status text, and logo.
Display color selection and VisualScore contrast checks now use role-specific floors.
Mouse trails, orbit lines, status text, and logo use separate rendering roles.

todos.title: Upgrade color selection to constrained OKLCH optimization
implemented: Added bounded OKLCH lightness/chroma search with role contrast constraints.
Hue-preserving search is preferred before contrast fallback.
Contrast fallback uses a stronger high-blue highlight target for terminal readability.

todos.title: Implement cell-space temporal anti-aliasing with history rejection
implemented: Added CellTemporalAaBuffer storing previous color, role, and confidence per cell.
History is rejected on role mismatch and high color delta.
Background and motion cells accumulate history; logo/status text remain crisp.

todos.title: Revise visual scoring around perceptual roles and temporal spectra
implemented: VisualScore now separates foreground_clarity and background_atmosphere.
Flicker uses role-weighted lightness deltas instead of only global frame deltas.
Contrast violations are evaluated against each cell's perceptual role.

todos.title: Add ablation fixtures for algorithm comparison
implemented: Added compact deterministic clumped-particle fixture.
Added compact deterministic role-contrast hierarchy fixture.
Extended tests to assert the scorer catches clumping and contrast hierarchy failures.
